events.text: Written to `/app/answer.json`. Since the field photo can't be traced to a specific, current-revision controlling sheet (no title block/revision/callout visible), I marked this `needs_more_info` rather than pass/fail — traceability must be re-established (correct sheet + test package data per ASME B31.3 §345) before a compliance determination can be made.
